title: Left lane must turn left locations (Sec. TPR-97)

street.description: Street or approach the left-lane traffic is on; for multi-street designations, the full phrase as written (whitespace-collapsed, not beautified, e.g. 'Winchester and Centre Streets', 'Commonwealth Avenue, North Drive')

direction.description: Direction(s) of travel the requirement applies to; 'all' for all-directions entries; empty when the source states none (every entry as of 2025-04-11 states one)

cross_street.description: Named street or way (street, avenue, parkway, on-ramp, named driveway) onto/at which the left turn is made; multi-target entries keep the conjunction verbatim ('Wachusett Road or Hammond Street'); empty when the target is a property/lot/address (see destination)

cross_street_direction.description: Carriageway direction of the target street when the source states a bare direction immediately after the cross street name ('onto Winchester Street southbound'); directions embedded in ramp designations stay in cross_street ('Route 9 eastbound on-ramp')

destination.description: Non-way turn target: property address, parking lot, or driveway-of-address introduced by 'into', or a street address following 'at' (e.g. '267-287 Grove Street', 'Trio Parking Lot', 'Driveway of 2150 Washington Street', '233 Needham Street'); empty when the target is a named street/way (see cross_street)

lane_detail.description: Lane qualifier from the source (e.g. '2 left lanes', 'two lanes'); empty when only the section-wide left lane(s) rule applies

location_detail.description: Positional or movement qualifier from the source (e.g. 'opposite Elm Street', 'on Washington Street Bridge over Mass. Turnpike', 'between Washington St and Foster St', 'continuing onto Washington Street'); multiple distinct qualifiers joined with '; ' in source order

notes.description: Extractor remarks about anomalies in the source text; never carries data
